title: pupalia thonningii
intro: Pupalia thonningii is a plant species commonly known as the "False Pigeonwings," native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pupalia thonningii include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Pupalia thonningii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots are often used in traditional remedies.
